summary: Tested Tactical tab branding update (Grok/Gemini removal) and image upload feature. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI elements verified successfully. Fixed one remaining Grok/Gemini mention in App.js line 1793.
passed_tests: POST /api/tactical/start returns welcome message WITHOUT 'Grok' mention
POST /api/tactical/start returns welcome message WITHOUT 'Gemini' mention
POST /api/tactical/start returns welcome message WITHOUT 'dual engine' mention
POST /api/tactical/message with text only returns response without model name mentions in structure
TacticalMessageRequest works with text only (no image)
TacticalMessageRequest with empty message and no image returns 400
Frontend: 3-tab navigation (Scan, Tactical, Tracking) renders correctly
Frontend: Tactical tab header says 'Reverse Tactical' with 'Live Intelligence' label
Frontend: No 'Grok' text visible anywhere in Tactical tab
Frontend: No 'Gemini' text visible anywhere in Tactical tab
Frontend: Camera/image upload button visible in tactical input area
Frontend: Tactical input placeholder says 'Ask anything, or upload a prop screenshot...'
Frontend: 4 quick suggestion buttons render on initial load
Frontend: Scan tab shows 'Scan a Prop' header with upload zone
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: App.js line 1793 had 'Grok tactical research + Gemini calibration' - changed to 'Tactical research + AI calibration'
Backend tactical.py correctly removes all model name mentions from responses
TacticalMessageRequest model (models.py line 76-79) correctly has optional image_base64 field
Frontend handleTacticalImage function (App.js line 649) properly handles image upload
tacticalFileRef (App.js line 108) and camera button (line 2173-2183) implement image attachment UI
seed_data_creation: None - using existing MongoDB cache data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tactical tab branding update verified. All Grok/Gemini mentions removed from both backend responses and frontend UI. Image upload feature implemented with camera button in tactical input area. Backend TacticalMessageRequest accepts optional image_base64 field. Frontend shows 'Live Intelligence' label instead of 'Grok + Gemini Dual Engine'.

backend_changes.tactical_start_message: Returns 'Reverse Tactical online...' without any AI model mentions
backend_changes.tactical_message_response: Response structure has {response, session_id, scanEntries} - no sources object with model names
backend_changes.system_prompts: GROK_SYSTEM and SYNTH_SYSTEM instruct AI to never mention model names

frontend_changes.removed_branding: No 'Grok', 'Gemini', or 'Dual Engine' text visible anywhere
frontend_changes.input_placeholder: 'Ask anything, or upload a prop screenshot...' at line 2190
